pr.title: Non-record: CoDA-GQA Differential Attention — First Differential Attention Submission (val_bpb=1.1580)

output.summary: Adds CoDA-GQA differential attention that subtracts a gated, orthogonally rotated noise stream from standard SDPA outputs without needing a second query projection.
techniques: Orthogonal rotation of attention query for noise stream
Gated subtraction of signal and noise followed by RMSNorm
Reuses same KV cache to avoid extra W_q matrix
